NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_HEART.title: Heart of Confession
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_HEART.descripti: At the start of your turn, gain {NunConfessionPower} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_HEART.flavor: A quiet pulse, counting sins in the dark.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_SPIRIT.title: Spirit of Confession
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_SPIRIT.descript: Whenever you play a Skill card, gain 1 Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_SPIRIT.flavor: The spirit whispers encouragement with every prayer.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_STATUE.title: Prayer Statue
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_STATUE.description: Every 5 turns, advance all your Prayers by 1 turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAYER_STATUE.flavor: Stone hands that never cease their devotion.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_IRON_SCEPTER.title: Iron Scepter
NIGHTMOON-NUN_IRON_SCEPTER.description: Whenever you play a Prayer card, deal 1 damage to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FAITH_BRACELET.title: Faith Bracelet
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FAITH_BRACELET.description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FAITH_BRACELET.flavor: Each bead a promise yet to be fulfilled.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANCIENT_TOME.title: Ancient Tome
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANCIENT_TOME.description: At the start of your turn, reduce all Prayer timers by 1.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANCIENT_TOME.flavor: Pages worn thin by generations of faithful hands.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MOON_PAPER_BOAT.title: Moon Paper Boat
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MOON_PAPER_BOAT.flavor: A fragile vessel that sails on moonlight.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BLESSING_STATUE.title: Blessing Statue
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BLESSING_STATUE.descriptio: At the start of combat, gain 2 Artifact.
